{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Hundred Hands of Terra Mara
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Hundred Hands of Terra Mara]] can manifest a giant hand to transplant rainforests.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
